impact: This gives the PP&D daemon deterministic retry instructions for task checkbox-49: use a syntax-first guardrail, split contract and fixture work into smaller cycles, require raw-body rejection to be tested explicitly, and avoid broad rewrites that have already caused blocked progress. It lets the worker continue with checkbox-51 while preserving a safe path to unblock checkbox-49 later.
summary: Add a narrow supervisor repair guide for recovering the blocked public source inventory validation task after repeated syntax and assertion failures.
target_task: Supervisor repair: 1 task(s) are blocked: Task checkbox-49: Add validation for the public source inventory that rejects non-allowlisted hosts, private DevHub paths, raw response bodies, downloaded documents, credentials, traces, screenshots, and missing provenance fields.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
